response_en: Thank you for reaching out! I completely understand that you are in need of speaking to our customer assistance. Rest assured, we are here to help! To connect with our customer support team, you can reach us through various channels. Our phone line at {{Customer Support Phone Number}} is available during our customer support hours. Alternatively, you can visit our website at {{Website URL}} and access our live chat feature to chat with our representatives in real-time. We are committed to providing you with the assistance you need. How may I be of further assistance to you?
response_cn: 感谢您联系我们！我非常理解您需要与我们的客服团队沟通。请放心，我们随时为您提供帮助！您可以通过多种渠道联系我们的客服团队。我们的客服热线电话号码是{{Customer Support Phone Number}}，在客服服务时间内均可拨打。或者，您也可以访问我们的官方网站{{Website URL}}，使用在线客服功能与我们的客服代表进行实时对话。我们致力于为您提供所需的帮助。请问还有什么可以为您效劳的吗？

instruction_en: ya have a free of charge number to talk to customer service
instruction_cn: 我们有一个免费的客服电话可以联系客服。
response_en: Your reach-out is appreciated! I'm sensing that you are looking for a toll-free number to connect with our customer service team. Yes, we do have a toll-free number for customer support. You can reach out to us at {{Toll-Free Number}} and our dedicated team will be happy to assist you. Is there anything else I can help you with?
response_cn: 感谢您的联系！我了解到您正在寻找我们的客服热线电话。是的，我们确实设有客户支持热线。您可以拨打{{Toll-Free Number}}联系我们，我们的专业团队将很乐意为您提供帮助。请问还有什么我可以帮您的吗？

instruction_en: need help chatting with a person
instruction_cn: 需要帮助与人工客服聊天
response_en: Always good to connect! I'm attuned to the fact that you need help chatting with a person. I'm here to assist you in connecting with one of our friendly representatives who can provide the support you need. Before I transfer you, could you please provide me with some more information about the specific issue you're facing? This will help ensure that the agent who assists you is well-prepared to address your concerns. Once you share the details, I'll make sure to connect you right away.
response_cn: 很高兴与您联系！我了解到您需要与人工客服聊天。我很乐意帮您转接我们的一位友好客服代表，为您提供所需的支持。在我为您转接之前，能否请您详细说明一下您遇到的具体问题？这将确保为您服务的客服人员能够充分准备好解决您的问题。一旦您分享详情，我会立即为您转接。

instruction_en: I do not know how to talk with a live agent
instruction_cn: 我不知道如何与在线客服交谈。
response_en:
We value your outreach! I'm in tune with the fact that you are unsure about how to speak with a live agent. Don't worry, I'm here to help guide you through the process. To speak with a live agent, simply follow these steps: 

1. On our website, look for the "Contact Us" or "Support" page. It is usually located in the upper or lower part of the homepage.
2. Click on the "Contact Us" or "Support" link, and you will be directed to a page where you can find different contact options.
3. Look for the option to speak with a live agent. This could be a phone number or a live chat button.
4. If there's a phone number provided, dial the number and follow the prompts to connect with a live agent. If there's a live chat option, click on it to start a conversation with an agent.
5. Once connected, explain your query or concern to the agent, and they will assist you further.

If you are having trouble finding the contact information or need further assistance, please let me know. I'm here to make sure you get the help you need.
response_cn:
感谢您的主动联系！我理解您对如何与人工客服沟通感到不确定。别担心，我来帮您了解具体流程。要联系人工客服，请按照以下步骤操作：

1. 在我们的网站上找到"联系我们"或"支持"页面，通常位于首页顶部或底部。
2. 点击"联系我们"或"支持"链接，进入包含多种联系方式的页面。
3. 寻找与人工客服沟通的选项，可能是电话号码或在线聊天按钮。
4. 如果有电话号码，请拨打并按照提示转接人工客服；如果有在线聊天选项，点击即可开始对话。
5. 连接后，向客服说明您的问题或疑虑，他们会为您提供进一步帮助。

如果您在查找联系方式时需要更多帮助，请随时告诉我。我会确保您获得所需的帮助。

instruction_en: can ya show me at what time customer assistance available is
instruction_cn: 请问客服什么时候可以为您提供帮助？
response_en: Glad you contacted us! I'm clearly cognizant that you would like to know the hours when our customer assistance is available. Our dedicated team is ready to assist you during {{Customer Support Hours}}. If you have any other questions or concerns, feel free to let me know. I'm here to help!
response_cn: 很高兴您联系我们！我了解到您想知道我们客服的在线时间。我们的专业团队在{{Customer Support Hours}}期间随时为您提供帮助。如果您还有其他问题或疑虑，请随时告诉我。我随时为您服务！
